title: 2. Semiotic garden visualization grammar (from Gemini).
content:
2. Semiotic garden visualization grammar (from Gemini).
3. Bloom feedback logic & category mapping (from Grok).
4. RAW/PUBLIC dual kernel spec (from all).

Then draft a Blueprint Schema (RLOS_v2.yaml) for modular implementation.

⸻

Would you like me to generate that RLOS_Design_Synthesis_v2.md document now — integrating all four AIs into one canonical framework (with cross-reference tables, architecture diagram, and environment vars)?
